name: cons-export
description: Zero-build Chrome extension for exporting ConsultantPlus documents.

scripts.check:syntax: find extension test -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.cjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.check:manifest: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('extension/manifest.json','utf8'));const fail=(message)=>{throw new Error(message)};if(m.manifest_version!==3)fail('manifest_version must be 3');const min=Number(m.minimum_chrome_version);if(!Number.isFinite(min)||min<120)fail('minimum_chrome_version must be a number >= 120');for(const key of ['name','version'])if(!m[key])fail('missing manifest field: '+key);const refs=[m.background?.service_worker,m.action?.default_popup,...Object.values(m.action?.default_icon||{}),...Object.values(m.icons||{}),...(m.content_scripts||[]).flatMap((entry)=>entry.js||[])].filter(Boolean);for(const ref of refs)if(!fs.existsSync(path.join('extension',ref)))fail('missing manifest file: '+ref);console.log('manifest: ok ('+m.version+')');"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:manifest && npm test
scripts.package: mkdir -p dist && cd extension && zip -q -r -FS ../dist/cons-export.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' && unzip -tq ../dist/cons-export.zip
